name: German's Sweet Chocolate Cake
recipeIngredient: 2 1/4 cups Sifted flour OR 2-1/2 cups sifted cake flour
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt chocolate in boiling water. Allow to cool.
2. Cream butter and sugar until fluffy.
3. Add egg yolks one at a time, beating well after each addition.
4. Blend in vanilla extract and melted chocolate.
5. Sift flour with baking soda and salt together.
6. Alternately add the sifted mixture and buttermilk to the chocolate mixture, beating after each addition until smooth.
7. Beat egg whites until stiff; fold in gently.
8. Pour batter into three 9-inch layer pans lined with paper on the bottoms.
9. Bake at 350°F for 30-35 minutes. Allow to cool.
10. Frost tops only.
Coconut-Pecan Frosting:
1. Combine evaporated milk, sugar, slightly beaten egg yolks, butter/margarine, and vanilla in a saucepan.
2. Cook over medium heat, stirring until thickened (about 12 minutes).
3. Stir in flaked coconut and chopped pecans.
4. Allow to cool until thick enough to spread, beating occasionally.
